2605.30054.title: Projectional Decoding: Towards Semantic-Aware LLM Generation
2605.30054.paper_summary: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used to generate software artifacts across many software engineering (SE) tasks, yet ensuring the semantic validity of these artifacts remains a fundamental challenge. Existing constrained decoding techniques can enforce syntactic correctness and, in some cases, specific semantic rules, but lack a general representation that bridges LLM-generated text with the reasoning required for semantic validation in SE. In this paper, we propose projectional decoding, a novel conceptual framework that integrates domain semantics directly into the generation process by maintaining, alongside text, a partial graph model as the primary artifact representation throughout generation. This abstract representation enables incremental semantic validation by explicitly capturing uncertainty and natively supporting error detection, while guiding generation toward semantically valid outputs with provable guarantees. We present preliminary results on a program generation task which demonstrate the potential of this approach to improve the semantic validity of LLM-generated artifacts. We also discuss how projectional decoding can enable verifiable automation with LLMs across various SE activities.
2605.30054.paper_summary_zh: 大型語言模型（LLMs）在許多軟體工程（SE）任務中越來越多地用於生成軟體工件，但確保這些工件的語義有效性仍然是一個根本挑戰。現有的約束解碼技術可以強制語法正確性，在某些情況下也能遵循特定的語義規則，但缺乏一種通用表示，無法將LLM生成的文本與SE中語義驗證所需的推理聯繫起來。在本文中，我們提出了投影解碼，這是一種新穎的概念框架，通過在生成過程中保持部分圖模型作為主要工件表示，將領域語義直接整合進生成過程中。這種抽象表示使得增量語義驗證成為可能，通過明確捕捉不確定性並原生支持錯誤檢測，同時引導生成朝向具有可證明保證的語義有效輸出。我們展示了在程序生成任務上的初步結果，證明了這種方法改善LLM生成工件語義有效性的潛力。我們還討論了投影解碼如何使LLMs在各種SE活動中實現可驗證的自動化。
2605.30054.author: Boqi Chen et.al.
2605.30054.authors: Boqi Chen, José Antonio Hernández López, Aren A. Babikian
